title: Polish Chickpea Salad
description: A delicious and easy-to-make salad originating from Poland, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Grill the polish sausage until browned and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Allow the sausage to rest for a few minutes before slicing into thin strips.
4. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, chickpeas, and sliced sausage.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar and Dijon mustard until well combined.
6. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
